title: Minecraft Multiverse
description: Add new 48 worlds with Weird and cool features!!!
body:
This datapack add 48 new world to the game, In order to travel between them you need to get to the Void Between Worlds

![The Void Between Worlds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef2429d148a4f9b7b23bb3509ebd7ec80299b2f7_0.webp)

___________________________________________________



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5ab2xiOZVbA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


________________________________________________


the map for the multiverse
![the map for the multiverse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a4e3d265f0e49f6df28804fe522558ad8ba56d.png)

or by opening a portal using my speedsters datapack and this command:

/trigger overworld_multiverse_portal set <universe number>





[The playlist for the speedsters datapack videos](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLEvwwrDqLHUJUOWQP680B4aoUZ9XNhcKI)
